channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Big Story: SpaceX IPO means more to the Gulf than you might expect
item.description: Gulf sovereign wealth funds are set to receive windfalls that will provide a timely boost to their balance sheets.

item.title: The man behind Claude Code says you are comparing AI costs to the wrong thing
item.description: Boris Cherny argues that most companies are asking the wrong question when evaluating AI investment.

item.title: We expect it to leak so we are just announcing it: OpenAI files confidential SEC paperwork for IPO
item.description: We expect it to leak so we are just announcing it, the company said in a statement.

item.title: A CEO guide for navigating a more dangerous world
item.description: Plus: All the latest news and office chatter from Fortune.
